meta.title: Eng. Mansoor Gabali (MNS70) — Software Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Mansoor Gabali (MNS70). Full-stack software engineer building elegant web, mobile, and fintech solutions.

projects.heading: Projects & Work
projects.subtitle: A selection of my recent projects, client work, and academic research.

velura.title: Velura Hotel Management System
velura.description: Full-stack hotel management system with online reservations, admin dashboard, room inventory, payment processing, real-time currency exchange API, email service, analytics & custom reports. Multilingual (EN/AR/TR), responsive, and fully branded.

eotra.title: Eotra Menu — SaaS Digital Menu Platform
eotra.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform I architected and own as a service. Branded QR menus with auto-translation (EN/AR/TR), 13 templates, drag-and-drop editor, analytics, and payment integration. Multi-DB tenant architecture with admin, business owner, and customer views.

ibosh.title: IBOSH — Luxury E-Commerce Platform
ibosh.description: Full-stack, multi-language luxury e-commerce platform with light/dark theming, Shopify integration for automatic product sync, O(1) product search, SEO-friendly multi-language routing (/en, /ar, /tr), WhatsApp checkout flow, and CDN-optimized delivery. Fully branded end-to-end.

tradespilot.title: TradesPilot AI — Automated Trading Platform
tradespilot.description: Full-stack fintech SaaS platform for automated forex trading. AI-powered trading bot, copy trading & signal marketplace, white-label integration, real-time analytics, and trusted partner ecosystem. Multilingual, light/dark theming, SEO-optimized, and responsive.

forex.title: Forex Trading Portfolio Platform
forex.description: Personal portfolio for forex trading with light/dark theming, full brand identity, EN & AR support with O(1) language/color switching. Integrated with TradingView real-time market prices and charts. Fintech-grade UI.

testing.title: Software Testing & Validation
testing.description: SWE431 academic project: top-down integration strategy with stubs and integration test sessions (S1–S4). Covers Repository → Controller flow, expected vs actual results, and full system testing.

latosta.title: LaTosta — Digital Restaurant Menu
latosta.description: Modern, responsive digital menu for LaTosta Restaurant in Jeddah, KSA. Mobile-first, QR-ready, Arabic & English, no app download needed. Optimized for speed & UX with seamless delivery platform redirection.

altava.title: Altava — E-Commerce System Architecture (C4 Model)
altava.description: Scalable e-commerce architecture documentation using C4 Model, clean architecture, and SOLID principles. 9 professional diagrams: Context, Container, Component, UML Class, Sequence, ERD, Deployment, Use Case, and Activity.

ibo.title: Client Portfolio — Ibo Global Influencer
ibo.description: Responsive portfolio for Ibo, a global influencer. Showcases personal brand, social media presence, and collaborations across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and Snapchat. Built with Next.js, smooth animations, and multilingual support.

librotrack.title: LibroTrack — Library Management System
librotrack.description: 100% Java library management system using MySQL, Swing, and JavaFX. Full CRUD for books and students, lending/returning, reports, and statistics across two databases.

vigor.title: Vigor — Workout Plan Sharing App
vigor.description: Fitness management mobile app for setting goals, tracking progress, and logging activities. Intuitive interface built with React Native and Expo to enhance engagement and motivation.

bus.title: Bus Reservation System
bus.description: Java-based bus reservation system for booking, updating, canceling, and searching reservations. Includes admin functionalities and data persistence.

bookstore.title: Bookstore Management System
bookstore.description: Command-line app built with JavaScript for managing bookstore inventory and sales. CRUD operations for books, sales processing, and receipt generation.

skills.heading: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: Tools I use to build modern software — tap any skill to learn how I apply it.
skills.selectHint: Tap a skill below to see its category and how I use it.

categoryDesc.frontend: Interfaces, components, styling, and polished client-side experiences.
categoryDesc.backend: APIs, server logic, authentication, and scalable application architecture.
categoryDesc.database: Data modeling, queries, persistence, and production-ready storage.
categoryDesc.devops: Containers, Linux environments, and reliable deployment workflows.
categoryDesc.mobile: Cross-platform apps with native-feel UI and smooth performance.
categoryDesc.tools: Version control, API testing, and day-to-day developer productivity.
categoryDesc.design: UI/UX exploration, prototypes, and design-to-code handoff.
